meta.name: legal_rag_special_training_cases
meta.created_for: 法规类 RAG：自动生成 embedding/reranker 训练集与回归验证
important_policy: 只从 completed 且 active_version 可见的文档生成正样本。
vector_pending 文档只能用于可见性负样本，不能生成 positive training pairs。
同名多版本未指定版本时默认作为 ambiguity/regression case，除非系统有显式 latest-version 策略。
title/toc/heading chunk 不能作为 positive passage，只能作为 source/section 定位线索。
partial_term_coverage 和 section_not_hit 应先触发 rescue，再决定是否 refusal。
recommended_auto_generation_pipeline: run /retrieve with debug metadata for each case
apply expected source policy and active_version filter
if evidence_ready or partial_answerable with body evidence: extract positive chunks
mine hard negatives from topK non-positive chunks, same-source wrong sections, title/toc, similar sources, other versions
write reranker pairs: query, passage, label
write embedding triples: query, positives, hard_negatives
keep refusal/clarification cases for regression, not positive training

cases.query: 长春市少数民族权益保障条例中，少数民族权益保障有哪些规定？

training_generation.label_policy: Use as positive-pair seed only if /retrieve returns evidence_ready or partial_answerable with body evidence. If no body evidence is found, keep as regression case, not positive training data.

cases.notes: 该文档当前 vector_pending，不能作为训练正样本，验证 pending_version 不可见。
